label: 112_director division_division_affairs board_division monetary
label_human: Federal Reserve board members and division heads
description: The Federal Reserve's Board of Governors and division leaders, including alternate members and presidents of regional banks, manage monetary affairs and research. Their roles involve policy decisions and oversight across the U.S. banking system.
